<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="103" height="20" role="img" aria-label="Hugging Face"><title>Hugging Face</title><filter id="huggingface-blur"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="16"/></filter><linearGradient id="huggingface-s" x2="0" y2="100%"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#bbb" stop-opacity=".1"/><stop offset="1" stop-opacity=".1"/></linearGradient><clipPath id="huggingface-r"><rect width="103" height="20" rx="3"/></clipPath><g clip-path="url(#huggingface-r)"><rect width="0" height="20" fill="#555"/><rect x="0" width="103" height="20" fill="#3f4a5c"/><rect width="103" height="20" fill="url(#huggingface-s)"/></g><g fill="#fff" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Verdana,Geneva,DejaVu Sans,sans-serif" text-rendering="geometricPrecision" font-size="110"><image x="5" y="3" width="14" height="14" href="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/><g transform="scale(.1)"><g aria-hidden="true" fill="#010101"><text x="605" y="150" fill-opacity=".8" filter="url(#huggingface-blur)" textLength="750">Hugging Face</text><text x="605" y="150" fill-opacity=".3" textLength="750">Hugging Face</text></g><text x="605" y="140" textLength="750">Hugging Face</text></g></g></svg>
</td>
</tr>
</table>
